def positive_open_redirect_via_user_supplied_url_without_allowlist():
    rule_id = "open_redirect_via_user_supplied_url_without_allowlist"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "HTTP redirect target constructed from user-supplied URL without allowlist validation."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
